Hey everyone, this is Russell Brunson, and I want to welcome you to this training about a script that is almost too simple. In fact, after you learn this, you're gonna be like, this is the most simple thing in the world. Yet, it is the tool that we use to sell, and I'll probably say 70% of what we sell nowadays. It's funny, I first learned this concept from John Carlton. I can't remember if it was an email or a course, or I can't remember what it was. I just remember he talked about his sales script, he said, everything I sell is based on this right here. So obviously you can go really deep with this as well, but this is a script that I use for anything that's free plus shipping, or $7, or some things that are really, really low ticket. It's called the Who, What, Why, How script. Like I said, it's really simple when you understand it, but he said, every good sales message needs to encompass these four things. Who, who are you, what is, what do you have? Next is why, why do they need it? And then last is how, how can they get it? So who, what, why, how? And I remember at first I was just like, because I've done so much training and spent so much time with the whole Star Story Solutions script, which we did on an earlier training, and that script I think is essential. Anytime you're selling something that, there's a story behind it, and usually higher ticket price things and things like that. But for the most part, a lot of times we're selling stuff that's really easy. We're selling why someone should register for your webinar, why someone should buy your free thing, why somebody should buy a really low ticket thing, right? It's an easy sales process. Sometimes we oversell it. I've seen people who go and have 20 or 30 minute video sales letters to sell a free plus shipping thing. And in fact, I've done it in the past sometimes, and it's just not really essential. If you can answer these four questions for somebody, then typically they're going to want to buy what it is you have. And so for me, like whenever I'm doing a video, when I have a product I'm creating really quickly and I'm having some register for a webinar or a tele-seminar or if I'm trying to sell my wife on something or my kids or my friends or whatever, I use this. And it's really simple when you start understanding it. So I'm going to kind of walk through the core of it and then we're going to drop down some of the other amplifiers here at the bottom. You can see catch, urgency, guarantee, and recap. And then I'll show you guys an example as well. So who will why how? So in fact, the example I'm going to show you guys, and so this will just be kind of a really good picture to help you understand. This is the .com secrets lab sales letter. A lot of you guys have seen this and bought the product, hopefully. If not, then you're crazy. Just go buy it. It's free. Plus shipping. So when I recorded this, the first variation we had was a really long, like, I don't know, 15, 20 minute video sales letter me selling some of why they should get this free book. And then after the, and we started kind of launching it, and it did all right, but nothing like spectacular. And after we launched it, I was like, the first box came in and I was so excited. I grabbed on my iPhone and I was like, I'm going to make a little iPhone video. I'll send people a video that click on that, then it'll go to the sales letter. So we clicked record on the iPhone, and in my head, all I thought was who or why how. So if you watch the video, it's basically saying, hey, my name is Russell Brunson. Can't answer who. We just got in our very first shipments of the .com secrets labs book, and I'm so excited to show it to you. So what is it? The .com secrets labs book. Then why do you need it? The reason why you need this book is inside here are 108 of my best split tests. In fact, check out this one right here, and check out this one right here. These are all split tests that have made us so much more money. If you take these split tests, you don't even have to go and split test the money. Just look at what we did and just copy it, and you'll have already got all the information that we had learned through thousands of dollars of testing. So that's why they need it. How can you get it? Somewhere on this page, I'm having a form. Just put your name, your email, your shipping address in, and we will ship you out a free copy of this book. So that's the who, what, why, how very, very quickly. It took, I mean, two and a half, three minutes, maybe max. And then I actually, on this video, oh, we actually split test this video versus the other one. And this video beat the long form 15, 20 minute long PowerPoint style video dramatically. And so this became the control. Eventually we took this and then we attacked on the back. I think I believe on the back of this we have, yeah, it's longer because of the back of it I added in the PowerPoint video as well. But the first, how far does it go? Minute 44 is just me doing who, what, why, how. And then I added in the other one. But again, the other one wasn't really necessary. In fact, if I was to do this again, I wouldn't have had the other one. I just had who, what, why, how, very simple, very easy, very, very awesome. So you see how it works? So when you're selling anything, think about that. Think about, okay, I have a webinar registration. Someone's lining on this page. I've got to answer who, what, why, how. So hey, my name is Russell Brunson. I'm doing a free webinar this week that's going to show you blah, blah, blah, blah. The reason why you need to be on this webinar is because blah, blah, blah, blah, blah. And the way you can get this is just put your name and your email address and form on the side and you'll be registered for the training webinar. Okay, see how easy who, what, why, how. Minute, minute, half max. Okay, and especially nowadays that we live like in the iPhone, YouTube video age, like it doesn't have to be professional videos. This video right here that has made us hundreds of thousands of dollars was shot on my iPhone with no microphone or anything, just me yelling at the camera because I was so excited about my product talking about the who, what, why, how. Okay, and again, I use this over and over. In fact, I'll pull up a whole bunch of other variations you guys can see. So here's the dot com secrets book many of you guys have. Now this one I'm a little more theatrical, right? We have like this little video thing happening and a bunch of cool stuff. But when I'll send done, guess what I use. Hey, you hear that? I said, hey, my name is Russell Brunson. And I want to share something really special to you. Okay, and I just, I'm following the script you guys. The same script I'm telling you about. I use this all the time. So I use it for the dot com secrets book, DCS Labs Monthly.com. Guess what script I use right here? Hey everyone, my name is Russell Brunson. I just answered the who. And I go into the what, why, how. So I use that for the dot com secrets labs monthly page. Same thing for, actually much for I use it here. Okay. Hey, my name is Russell Brunson. Boom, who, what, why, how. I use it here on this page on the perfect webinar page as well. Okay. So I use it over and over and over and over and over again. It gives me the ability to create and put out offers way faster than anyone else. Because I don't have to go and spend a month or two months or three months writing a sales letter. Now, obviously if it's a higher ticket product, you're going to need more of that. But for low front end products or for webinars or for hangouts or things like that that you are selling, that you just have to push somebody over the edge. This is when I use the script and I use it over and over and over and over again. It becomes part of my vocabulary. When I'm in front of a camera, I know these are the four questions I have to answer. Who, what, why, how. And so the better you get at this, the more money you'll be able to make, the faster you'll be able to put out offers because you don't have to go through all of the stress and the effort that you typically have to do when creating any kind of video or sales process. Okay. So hope that helps you understand who, what, why, how. Now, I want to kind of transition into some of the amplifiers. And the amplifiers down here, we call it the catch urgency guarantee and recap. So I'm going to show you guys where I use these. Typically, I don't, I'm not so much to do them in the videos. You could. But for me, it's more of an afterthought mostly because like when I'm in front of a camera on the fly, I don't always remember catch urgency guarantee recap, right? It's easy for me to remember who, what, why, how. So I usually put these things down later on in the sales letter. So if you come down here with this one right here, here I just kind of recap the offer. I show a bunch of cool things, bull points at what's going to be in the product. But then down here, you will notice I transition to answer right here. Okay. So the first one is the catch. Okay. Typically on anything, it's a webinar, free play shipping product, $7 product, things like that. The first question people are going to have is like, what's the catch? Right. So I address that. What is the catch? There is no catch. Okay. There's some websites that offer you something cool for free, but they stick you into some program that charges your card every single month. This is not one of them. There's no hidden continuity program. And in case you're wondering why I'm doing this, well, there's a few reasons. Okay. I talk about the reasons why I'm doing it. So there's the first thing is that there is no catch. Okay. Second, I got to move into urgency. Like why do they need to take action right now? Okay. So I come here and say time is of the essence. Here's why. I ordered a thousand copies. The first batch sold out 40 hours. I had to pull the page down or a thousand more two weeks later they showed up and most of them have already been disappeared almost instantly. This page is still up and we have some left, but it's a simple matter of supply and demand and they're going to go fast. And now there's some urgency tied into that. Okay. Then I transition now over to the guarantee. So here's my you got to be crazy guarantee. You're going to love this book. Otherwise, let me know and I'll give you the refund anyway. And then come back here and I recap the offer. And typically for me it is down in the PS and here's recap. For those of you like me who just skipped the letter, here is the deal. I'm going to give you this. There's no cash, no gimmicks. If you don't know the book I'm refunded shipping costs. So I just kind of recapped these catch urgency guarantee. And that is how I create a page like that. Now, if I was doing the video over from scratch and my initial goal was to make a sales video using the script like for the dot com secrets labs I told you before like this video was an afterthought that just happened to out convert. But if I would have had that as my first thing that I did, I would have tried to put these things in. So I would have said something like, hey, my name is Russell Brunson. I've got this a brand new book called 108 proven split tests. And the reason why you need this book is because if you have a website, you don't know what's version is going to convert better. We spent tens of thousands of dollars testing every variation we can dream of. This book is going to show you which test one and then you can just copy it. Now the way you can get this is just give us your name and your address and your shipping number and we'll ship this out for you. You just cost, you know, you're going to pay a tiny shipping and handling fee outside that this book is free. And now you're probably wondering what is the catch? Russell, well, the reality is there is no catch. I want to get one of these books in your hand because I know if you get it, you're going to love it. And hopefully if you love it and have an amazing experience, you will want to come back and buy more things from you in the future. So there's no catch. There's no shipping, no nothing. There's no continuity programs. This is a free gift for you. But you got to act fast. These are physical books. We had to order them from a bookstore, from book publisher. When we run out, it's about three or four weeks. The lay first order more. And so this page is up, which means there's some in stock right now, but these will be gone soon. And I have a guarantee as well. If you get this book right now and you take it and decide you hate it, let me know and we will refund your shipping costs. It's free, so I don't have anything else to refund. I'll give you your shipping cost plus you can just keep the book. That's how much I believe in this book. You're going to love it. The guarantee is awesome. So real quick, the recap. I'm going to ship you out this book for free. It's not going to cost you anything. There's no catch. And I guarantee you, even if you don't love it, I will refund your shipping fee and let you keep the book. So all you got to do right now is what? I'm like, how? Put your name, email address, and on the form on the side now. And we will ship you out one of these books. So you see how I did that? I was able to take the Who Ways House script plus these little amplifiers down here and very quickly make a video. It doesn't take a ton of time, a ton of effort, a ton of retakes. So for you, what I want you to do, the way to become a master at this script is open up this thing. If you're one of our monthly new members, you probably got a physical copy that's like, hold it. Put it up in front of your camera. Have someone hold it behind your iPhone. So you look at it and just look at the questions and just answer them. Because it's very simple after you get comfortable with it. And just practice. Like right now, look at your computer monitor. If you're looking at that, pause this video and pitch something. Look around on your desk and find something that you can pitch. For example, on my desk right here, I have some B-complex drops. This is just random thing on my desk. If I was going to sell this, I would just go, okay, boom. Hey, my name is Russell Brunson and I have got a really cool offer for you today. This is the B-complex Sublingual Liquid B12 Vitamins. And the reason why you want these is if you're sluggish during the day and you have low energy, you just take a little drop like this, put it underneath your tongue and it'll give you an instant boost of energy. Now how can you get this? Well, typically I sell this product for $49.95 on my website, but I'm going to give you a special deal for just $12. I will ship you a bottle of this stuff so you can try it out and see if it's awesome. Now why would I do this? What's the catch you're probably thinking? Well, there is no catch. I want you to try it because as soon as you try it once and you get that surge of energy, you will know this is a product you want to take every single day and I'm hoping in the future you'll keep reordering from me. But you've got to act fast. We have a limited order. It takes me a couple months to ship out new Vitamins B12 of these droplets. And so do that and I guarantee you're going to love it. If you don't love it, whatever reason, let us know and we'll let you keep it and we'll give you back your money because obviously I don't want you to ship back the drops. That'd be creepy. So you can keep them. It's going to be awesome. So here's my recap. For just $12, I will give you a bottle of this supplement that normally costs $49.95, but you've got to act now because it's going fast. So footage and email address, your credit card and form on the right and I'll send this thing out to you right now. Okay, boom. I made a whole sales pitch for this product that fast. Let me find another thing I can do it for. Here is a stapler. Okay, I'm doing this facetiously as a joke, but I want you guys to do this. Find somebody on your desk right now and pitch it using the script because you can pitch anything so easily. So I'm pitching it. My name is Russell Brunson and I have got the most amazing swing lying stapler here that I have ever seen in my life. It's black, it's gray, it's awesome and it can staple things. Now the reason why you need the stapler, if you're ever at your office and you've got papers all over the place that's making a mess and your sick, those big bulky staplers or little small ones that get lost, this stapler will be the one that you will use for the rest of your life. Now you're probably wondering, how do I get the stapler? Well, I got something really special for you. Instead of charging the normal $19.95 that you can get this thing for on Amazon, I will send it to you for free plus shipping, pay $7.95 shipping and that way you will have a stapler that will be awesome for you. And you're probably wondering, what's the catch, Russell? The catch is this. The money in this business is not in selling the stapler, it's in selling the staples. And I want you to have the most amazing stapler in the world for free. That way you will come back in the future and buy staples from me. That's where I make my money and that's my goal. Right now I just want to send you out this amazing offer so that you have a great experience with me. And there's urgency though. These staplers are heavy, they're expensive. I only ordered 200 of them. When these 200 are gone, I will have to jack the price back up to $19.95 that we charged for on Amazon. But for the next 200 people, you guys get it for free and I guarantee you're going to love the stapler. If not, just let me know and you can keep it and I'll refund the money. So to recap, this stapler, normally $19.95, you guys get it for free if and only if you act right now. So fill out the form on the side now and I will ship you out your free stapler. Okay? All right, so that's how it works you guys. And I've done this a million times. I pitch so many people's products in so many different ways and the Huahua script is magic. It's essential for you to learn, to understand, to master and to use over and over and over again. It's one of our simpler scripts which is why this video is not super long but it's also one of the most powerful ones. And so it's one that you guys need to have in your arsenal to be able to pull out at the drop of a hat. Okay? Someone meets you in an event like, hey, what do you do for a living? This is my elevator pitch. Okay, my name is Russell Brunson and I, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, you know, I help business owners to dramatically increase their sales online. The reason why you probably need that is I'm guessing you don't have enough, you're not making enough sales online, right? So if you're interested in having me help you with this, all you got to do, give me your business card and one of the sharks from my team will call you and sell you our high end coaching programs, right? So I use this as an elevator pitch. I use it for a webinar pitch. I use it for free plus shipping. I use it for cheap $7 things. I use it for discounts. I use it for bonuses. I use it for special promotions that stand out to my list. I use over and over and over and over again. Okay? If you've been on my list for any stretch of time, you've probably seen a dozen of these or more and didn't even realize it. And moving forward, every time you see one, you're like, ah, there it is. Who what why how? I know what Russell's doing. He seems way smarter than he is. All he's using is the exact same pitch. He uses over and over and over again. So I hope that this helps. I hope that this has been beneficial for you. So go now, pause this video. It's over. So end it. You can practice on your desk and practice pitching it. The more you practice, the better you will become and you will have a ton of fun with this. So thanks again so much. My name is Russell Brunson and I appreciate you guys being on this training.
